requirement_topic.en: URE / DSO Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Polish Network
requirement_topic.zh: 波兰URE/配电运营商并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz电网
requirement_topic.zht: 波蘭URE/配電運營商併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz電網

summary.en: Poland's electricity sector is regulated by URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki, Energy Regulatory Office), with PSE (Polskie Sieci Elektroenergetyczne) operating the transmission system and local DSOs (distribution system operators, such as Energa, Tauron, PGE Dystrybucja, Enea, innogy Stoen) managing the distribution network and processing grid-connection applications for EV charging installations. The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz — the same frequency as China but different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation. For large charging installations, EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) may impose additional grid-connection requirements.
summary.zh: 波兰电力行业由URE（波兰能源监管局）监管，PSE（波兰输电系统运营商）运营输电系统，当地配电运营商（如Energa、Tauron、PGE Dystrybucja、Enea、innogy Stoen）管理配电网并受理电动汽车充电设施的并网申请。低压电网环境为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz——与中国频率相同，但名义电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成DSO供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。大型充电设施可能需满足欧盟RfG法规（2016/631）的额外并网要求。
summary.zht: 波蘭電力行業由URE（波蘭能源監管局）監管，PSE（波蘭輸電系統運營商）運營輸電系統，當地配電運營商（如Energa、Tauron、PGE Dystrybucja、Enea、innogy Stoen）管理配電網並受理電動汽車充電設施的併網申請。低壓電網環境為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz——與中國頻率相同，但名義電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成DSO供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、調試及書面項目驗收。大型充電設施可能需滿足歐盟RfG法規（2016/631）的額外併網要求。

standards_or_laws: URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — Energy Regulatory Office electricity-sector oversight
PSE and local DSO (Energa, Tauron, PGE Dystrybucja, Enea, innogy Stoen) grid-connection and project acceptance requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Poland 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline. Polish DSO connection requirements, protection relay settings, and meter specifications differ from Chinese grid-operator procedures.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：波兰230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。波兰DSO接入要求、保护继电器设置和电表规格与中国电网运营商程序不同。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：波蘭230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。波蘭DSO接入要求、保護繼電器設置和電表規格與中國電網運營商程序不同。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for Polish DSO review. For Poland's continental climate, cold-temperature start-up ratings, freeze-thaw enclosure ratings, and winter-operation data should also be included. Polish-language commissioning and installation documentation is expected by DSOs and local inspection authorities. Polish DSO queue times for large EV charging installations can be significant — engage early.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按波兰DSO审查准备。对于波兰大陆性气候，还应包括低温启动额定值、外壳冻融额定值和冬季运行数据。DSO和当地检查机构期望提供波兰语调试和安装文件。波兰DSO大型电动汽车充电设施的申请排队时间可能较长——请尽早启动申请。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按波蘭DSO審查準備。對於波蘭大陸性氣候，還應包括低溫啟動額定值、外殼凍融額定值和冬季運行數據。DSO和當地檢查機構期望提供波蘭語調試和安裝文件。波蘭DSO大型電動汽車充電設施的申請排隊時間可能較長——請盡早啟動申請。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations in Poland require DSO project review and acceptance; URE licensing may apply to larger installations; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Polish DSO/URE approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Poland 230/400 V

source.publisher: Energy Regulatory Office (URE — Urząd Regulacji Energetyki)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Poland-ready EVSE needs DSO project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Polish-language documentation is expected by DSOs and local authorities. Cold-temperature operation and freeze-thaw enclosure data are required for Polish continental climate deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向波兰的EVSE需要DSO项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。DSO和当地主管当局期望提供波兰语文件。波兰大陆气候部署需要低温运行和外壳冻融数据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向波蘭的EVSE需要DSO項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。DSO和當地主管當局期望提供波蘭語文件。波蘭大陸氣候部署需要低溫運行和外殼凍融數據。
